site.name: Casa Karaya
site.heroSubtitle: A calm, polished home base for your stay. Everything you need is here, from room notes to appliance instructions.
site.heroNote: Named for the Taíno moon goddess. Your home, illuminated.
site.footerNote: Keep this guide updated as the home changes so each guest gets the right information.

quickFacts.label: Check-in
quickFacts.detail: Self check-in with keypad or host instructions.

quickFacts.label: Check-out
quickFacts.detail: Please leave keys on the kitchen counter before departure.

quickFacts.label: Parking
quickFacts.detail: Use the garage gate fob if assigned.

areas.name: Living Room
areas.summary: The main place to relax, gather, and unwind.
instructions: The TV remote is on the media console.
Please keep balcony doors closed while the A/C is running.
Extra throw blankets are stored in the sideboard.
The dimmer switch controls the main room lighting.

areas.name: Primary Bedroom
areas.summary: Quiet retreat with blackout curtains and bedside charging.
instructions: A/C remote is on the right-hand nightstand.
Use the curtain pull gently to avoid tangling.
Extra pillows and blankets are in the closet.
Please do not place luggage on the bedding.

areas.name: Guest Bedroom
areas.summary: Comfortable overflow sleeping space for extra guests.
instructions: Closet hangers are available for short stays.
Fresh towels are placed on the bed before arrival.
Let the host know if an extra set of linens is needed.

areas.name: Kitchen
areas.summary: Stocked for simple meals, coffee, and everyday use.
instructions: Salt, pepper, oil, and basic seasonings are in the upper cabinet.
Trash is under the sink and recycling is in the blue bin.
Please wipe counters and stovetop after cooking.
Filtered water pitcher is kept in the refrigerator.

areas.name: Balcony
areas.summary: Outdoor sitting area with open city views.
instructions: Do not leave cushions outside during heavy rain.
No smoking on the balcony.
Please avoid placing items on the railing.

appliances.name: Air Conditioning
appliances.summary: Use the remote to adjust room temperature and mode.
instructions: Press Power to turn the unit on or off.
Recommended setting is 23 to 25 C for comfort.
Please turn the unit off when leaving for long periods.
Keep windows and balcony doors closed while cooling.

appliances.name: Water Heater
appliances.summary: Turn on before showers if hot water is needed.
instructions: Switch the heater on at the panel before use.
Wait 10 to 15 minutes for hot water.
Turn the heater off again after use to save energy.

appliances.name: Washer and Dryer
appliances.summary: Laundry setup for small guest loads.
instructions: Use one detergent pod per load.
Cold water is best for most fabrics.
Clean the dryer lint trap before each cycle.
Leave the washer door slightly open after use.

appliances.name: Coffee Machine
appliances.summary: Single-serve machine with pods stored nearby.
instructions: Fill the rear reservoir with fresh water.
Insert a pod and press the desired cup size.
Discard used pods after brewing.
Extra pods are in the cabinet above the machine.

appliances.name: Smart TV
appliances.summary: Streaming-ready television in the living room.
instructions: Use the Home button on the Samsung remote.
Guests may log into personal streaming accounts if needed.
Please log out of personal accounts before checkout.

houseRules.title: No Smoking
houseRules.description: The apartment and balcony are both smoke-free.

houseRules.title: Respect Quiet Hours
houseRules.description: Please keep noise low from 10 PM to 8 AM.

houseRules.title: A/C Off When Away
houseRules.description: Turn off air conditioning when leaving the apartment.

houseRules.title: Care for Furnishings
houseRules.description: Please treat the home, artwork, and appliances with care.

localTips.title: Restaurants Nearby
items: Meson D'Bari for Dominican comfort food.
Segafredo for coffee and light breakfast.
Jalao for a more upscale local dinner.

localTips.title: Essentials
items: Farmacia Carol is nearby for quick pharmacy runs.
Nacional is the easiest grocery option for guests.
Uber is the most straightforward ride option.

contacts.label: Host
contacts.name: Casa Karaya Host
contacts.description: Use this number first for guest questions, arrival support, or anything inside the apartment.

contacts.label: Building
contacts.name: Concierge and Security
contacts.description: Contact for lobby access, building issues, or after-hours support.
